subcodes.first_line: O thou servant of Baha! What thou hast written unto Jinab-i-Mirza Asadu'llah hath become known [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا خادم البهاء آنچه بجناب میرزا اسدالله مرقوم نموده بودید معلوم گردید
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @suffering and imprisonment, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @praise and encouragement, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
